item.description: <p>🦄 Uniswap shocked traders with a +24% surge and massive whale activity and volume Tuesday. item.description: Read more ⤵️ cryptoquant.com/insights/qui…

item.title:
Nearly Half of All Stablecoins Are Waiting on Exchanges
“Liquidity remains abundant, but highly selective. As a result, modest changes in investor conviction, risk appetite, or capital deployment con
item.description:
Nearly Half of All Stablecoins Are Waiting on Exchanges
“Liquidity remains abundant, but highly selective. As a result, modest changes in investor conviction, risk appetite, or capital deployment continue to generate disproportionate volatility across Bitcoin.” – By @MorenoDV_

item.title:
Altcoin Sell Pressure Hits a 5-Year Extreme
“This is not a dip. It’s 15 months of continuous net selling on Spot Exchanges. Cumulative buy/sell volume diff (alts excluded BTC/ETH): deepest negative r
item.description:
Altcoin Sell Pressure Hits a 5-Year Extreme
“This is not a dip. It’s 15 months of continuous net selling on Spot Exchanges. Cumulative buy/sell volume diff (alts excluded BTC/ETH): deepest negative reading since data began in 2020.” – By @IT_Tech_PL

item.title:
R to @cryptoquant_com: Bull-Bear Market Indicator
A cycle momentum signal based on the gap between the PnL Index and its 365-day moving average.
Helpful for tracking whether the market is leaning bu
item.description:
Bull-Bear Market Indicator
A cycle momentum signal based on the gap between the PnL Index and its 365-day moving average.
Helpful for tracking whether the market is leaning bull, bear, early bull, or overheating.
Endpoint:
GET /v2/community/bitcoin-bull-bear-indicator

item.title:
R to @cryptoquant_com: Trader Realized Price
Shows the realized price of Bitcoin held for 1–3 months, with max, upper, lower, and min price bands.
Useful for tracking where recent buyers may be sitt
item.description:
Trader Realized Price
Shows the realized price of Bitcoin held for 1–3 months, with max, upper, lower, and min price bands.
Useful for tracking where recent buyers may be sitting in profit or stress.
Endpoint:
GET /v2/community/bitcoin-trader-realized-price

item.title:
R to @cryptoquant_com: Apparent Demand
Tracks Bitcoin spot demand changes over 30 days and one year.
Useful for spotting when demand is expanding, cooling, or flipping direction.
Endpoint:
GET /v2
item.description:
Apparent Demand
Tracks Bitcoin spot demand changes over 30 days and one year.
Useful for spotting when demand is expanding, cooling, or flipping direction.
Endpoint:
GET /v2/community/bitcoin-apparent-demand

item.title:
New on the CryptoQuant API 👀
10 Bitcoin signals built as queries are now API endpoints.
The metrics you’ve been reading on charts can now be pulled in one call, straight into bots, alerts, dashboard
item.description:
New on the CryptoQuant API 👀
10 Bitcoin signals built as queries are now API endpoints.
The metrics you’ve been reading on charts can now be pulled in one call, straight into bots, alerts, dashboards, and models.
Here are three we’d watch closely 👇

item.title:
RT by @l2beat: Presenting now, @l2beat on providing open-source research and analytics on Layer 2s and public protocols, including interoperability, DA, and ZK infrastructure.
A few wins from them: -
item.description:
Presenting now, @l2beat on providing open-source research and analytics on Layer 2s and public protocols, including interoperability, DA, and ZK infrastructure.
A few wins from them: - New Interoperability page and the entire infrastructure around it - Token registry covering 3,000+ token deploymen

item.title:
R to @l2beat: This isn’t a generic feed. Every single L2 project page on L2BEAT has its own dedicated Updates tab.
So feel free to check and explore the updates of your favorites L2s.
https://l2bea
item.description:
This isn’t a generic feed. Every single L2 project page on L2BEAT has its own dedicated Updates tab.
So feel free to check and explore the updates of your favorites L2s.
l2beat.com/scaling/summary

item.title:
R to @l2beat: Ever wonder exactly when an L2 changed its contracts or modified its risk parameters?
No more digging through endless Discord servers or GitHub repos. This section has been quietly cen
item.description:
Ever wonder exactly when an L2 changed its contracts or modified its risk parameters?
No more digging through endless Discord servers or GitHub repos. This section has been quietly centralizing the entire history of ecosystem changes so you don't have to.

item.title:
RT by @lex_node: Something the crypto ecosystem lacks: patience
Every winter is the end of crypto, every narrative change is seen as the final one, no one waits for the dust to settle. Real shift in
item.description:
Something the crypto ecosystem lacks: patience
Every winter is the end of crypto, every narrative change is seen as the final one, no one waits for the dust to settle. Real shift in social and financial rails takes time. And patience.

item.title:
RT by @lex_node: Had a conversation today with an institution wanting to build on ETH
There default stance is if we are building on ETH, we should own some and run our own nodes
Violently higher
item.description:
Had a conversation today with an institution wanting to build on ETH
There default stance is if we are building on ETH, we should own some and run our own nodes
Violently higher

item.title: RT by @lex_node: An amazing article I missed at the time, bravo! This mirrors my own thinking on our future within an AI dominated, post-totalitarian society. It's not about building walled, crypto gh
item.description:
An amazing article I missed at the time, bravo! This mirrors my own thinking on our future within an AI dominated, post-totalitarian society. It's not about building walled, crypto ghettos into which we retreat. The misunderstood core theme of The Parallel Polis is UNIVERSALITY.
_gabrielShapir0 (@

item.title:

Andrew Tate (@Cobratate), who's been liquidated 107 times, is back!
He opened a 40x long on 57.36 $BTC($3.76M).
Liquidation price: $65,215.87

item.title:
What an incredible #WorldCup bettor!
He made $9.24M in a single day, winning all 4 of his bets for a 100% win rate.
In the Iran vs. New Zealand match, he spent $7.03M betting that Iran would not win
item.description:
What an incredible #WorldCup bettor!
He made $9.24M in a single day, winning all 4 of his bets for a 100% win rate.
In the Iran vs. New Zealand match, he spent $7.03M betting that Iran would not win.
He was right — and made $7.34M from that bet alone!
polymarket.com/0x96cfcb0c309…

He then went long on $UNI!

If Argentina draws or loses, he will w
item.description:
The #WorldCup match between Argentina and Algeria is about to start.
Whale "weatherman12" just spent $1.81M betting on Argentina not to win and Algeria (+1.5).
If Argentina draws or loses, he will win both bets and profit $2.65M.
polymarket.com/0xd1c537b2a7c…
